steps.name: Add tool_context parameter to engine evaluate path
steps.description: Extend engine.evaluate() and _rule_triggers() to accept and forward tool_context dict. Default empty dict. Existing evaluator behavior unchanged.
criteria: Engine evaluate() accepts optional tool_context parameter
_rule_triggers() forwards tool_context to evaluator.triggers()
All 5 existing evaluators continue to pass with tool_context absent
All 5 existing evaluators continue to pass with tool_context present

steps.name: Hook adapter extracts file_path and resolves artifact existence
steps.description: PreToolUse handler extracts file_path from hook input. Resolves wave-5-visuals artifact directory. Checks prerequisite file existence. Passes tool_context to engine.evaluate().
criteria: file_path extracted from hook_input['tool']['file_path'] for PreToolUse
When file_path contains wave-5-visuals/, prerequisite files checked on disk
tool_context dict passed to engine.evaluate() with file_path and artifacts_present
When file_path is outside wave-5-visuals/, artifacts_present is empty list
Both multi-proposal and legacy path layouts resolved correctly

steps.name: FigurePipelineGateEvaluator domain logic
steps.description: Pure domain evaluator. Blocks writes to wave-5-visuals/ when figure-specs.md absent. Allows writing figure-specs.md itself. Ignores paths outside wave-5-visuals/.
criteria: Write to wave-5-visuals/ blocked when figure-specs.md not in artifacts_present
Writing figure-specs.md itself always allowed
Edit to wave-5-visuals/ blocked same as Write when specs absent
Writes outside wave-5-visuals/ not affected
Block message includes guidance to create figure-specs.md first

steps.name: StyleProfileGateEvaluator domain logic
steps.description: Pure domain evaluator. Blocks figure writes when no style-profile.yaml and no skip marker. Allows writing style-profile.yaml and figure-specs.md. Checks state for style_analysis_skipped.
criteria: Figure write blocked when style-profile.yaml absent and no skip marker in state
Figure write allowed when style-profile.yaml in artifacts_present
Figure write allowed when style_analysis_skipped is true in state
Writing style-profile.yaml itself always allowed
Block message includes both resolution paths (create profile or record skip)

steps.name: Register evaluators in engine and add rules to config
steps.description: Register both evaluators in EnforcementEngine._evaluators dict. Add two rules to pes-config.json. Verify dispatch end-to-end.
criteria: Engine _evaluators contains 'figure_pipeline_gate' mapped to FigurePipelineGateEvaluator
Engine _evaluators contains 'style_profile_gate' mapped to StyleProfileGateEvaluator
pes-config.json contains rule 'figure-pipeline-requires-specs' with type 'figure_pipeline_gate'
pes-config.json contains rule 'figure-generation-requires-style' with type 'style_profile_gate'

steps.name: Integration tests: end-to-end pipeline enforcement
steps.description: Integration tests loading real pes-config.json through engine. Verify both gates block and allow correctly through full hook-to-evaluator path.
criteria: Figure write blocked end-to-end when specs absent (config -> engine -> evaluator -> BLOCK)
Figure write allowed end-to-end when both prerequisites met
Style gate blocks independently when specs present but style absent
Both gates pass for writes outside wave-5-visuals/

steps.name: BDD acceptance tests from feature scenarios
steps.description: Acceptance tests implementing all 16 Gherkin scenarios from journey-enforcement.feature. Validates blocking, allowing, path resolution, non-interference, and audit trail.
criteria: All 16 scenarios from journey-enforcement.feature pass
Audit log entries verified for block and allow decisions
Multi-proposal and legacy path layouts covered
